svg.title: The detection matrix: every deliberate bug versus the techniques that defend it
svg.desc: Coverage strip: 22 of 24 deliberate bugs caught (2 awaiting a deeper lane, 0 open gaps). In the grid, strong cells are catches; soft-tinted cells are off-boundary — a specialized technique correctly staying green on a bug it does not defend; red is an open gap (none today); faint cells are not applicable or not yet run. Full per-cell detail is in docs/detection-matrix.md.
